<!-- source-hash: c2b26e25b21944503ff5cdccf5648e3e -->
Maps `Machine` documents and related `Tag` entities to their corresponding API response DTOs for the device management layer of the OpenFrame platform.

## Key Components

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `toDeviceResponse(Machine, List<Tag>)` | Converts a single `Machine` document with its tags into a `DeviceResponse` DTO |
| `toDevicesResponse(CountedGenericQueryResult<Machine>)` | Maps a paginated list of machines (without tags) to a `DevicesResponse` |
| `toDevicesResponseWithDeviceTags(CountedGenericQueryResult<Machine>, List<List<Tag>>)` | Maps a paginated list of machines with per-machine tag lists to a `DevicesResponse` |
| `toDeviceTagResponse(Tag)` | Converts a single `Tag` document to a `DeviceTagResponse` DTO |
| `toDeviceFilterResponse(DeviceFilters)` | Maps available filter options (status, OS type, tags, etc.) to a `DeviceFilterResponse` |

## Usage Example

```java
// Inject the mapper
@Autowired
private DeviceMapper deviceMapper;

// Map a single machine with its tags
Machine machine = machineRepository.findById(machineId);
List<Tag> tags = tagRepository.findByMachineId(machineId);
DeviceResponse response = deviceMapper.toDeviceResponse(machine, tags);

// Map a paginated result set with per-machine tags
CountedGenericQueryResult<Machine> queryResult = machineRepository.findAll(query);
List<List<Tag>> tagsPerMachine = tagService.getTagsForMachines(queryResult.getItems());
DevicesResponse devicesResponse = deviceMapper.toDevicesResponseWithDeviceTags(queryResult, tagsPerMachine);

// Map filter options for the device list UI
DeviceFilters filters = filterService.getAvailableFilters();
DeviceFilterResponse filterResponse = deviceMapper.toDeviceFilterResponse(filters);
```

> **Note:** When tag data is unavailable or unnecessary, use `toDevicesResponse` for efficiency. Use `toDevicesResponseWithDeviceTags` when tag metadata must be included per device, ensuring index-aligned pairing between machines and their tag lists.
